creator: kib@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 177443
Update to today github snapshot 2016-11-27

There were no release of the utility for long time, and probably would be not in the nearby future.  A lot of improvements were made to the code, and keeping the port at aging 1.30 does not make sense.

I tested this in 11.0 for build, and on stable/11 for runtime.
